title: Resource-Access Schema Relocation — move from repo root to schemas/ and register
description: Moves resource-access.schema.json from SR repo root to schemas/resource-access.schema.json via git mv and registers it via luhtech-schema refs rebuild. Schema already exists at root (authored 2026-05-30, v1.0.0, 13617 bytes) and validates EB PR #257's .roadmap/resource-access.json instance cleanly per substrate read part 2 (2026-06-01). Work is move + register, not author from scratch. Closes two FUs in one PR: FU-RESOURCE-ACCESS-SCHEMA-AUTHORING-1 (EB register, P2, unblocks PR #257) and FU-LUHTECH-SCHEMA-REFS-RESOURCE-ACCESS-PLACEMENT-1 (SR register cleanup, P2). Cross-chat coordination: post-merge, SR comments on EB PR #257 with new schema id URL + SR merge SHA to enable EB to reactivate branch feat/resource-access-schema-2026-05-30.

outputs.description: schemas/resource-access.schema.json created via git mv from repo root. Content byte-identical to prior root location.
acceptanceCriteria: sha256 hash matches the pre-move root copy
Re-validates EB PR #257 instance: ajv-cli exit 0

outputs.description: resource-access.schema.json at repo root REMOVED. Single canonical location maintained.
acceptanceCriteria: File does not exist at repo root
git history shows rename not delete+add

outputs.description: schema-refs.json regenerated via luhtech-schema refs rebuild. New .schemas.resource-access entry; changelog appended.
Prospective deliverable spec — S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7/S8 in post-merge amendment.

preMerge: Substrate baseline (Step 1): root file exists at 13617 bytes, target path free, no registry entry
Schema validates EB PR #257 instance at new schemas/ path (ajv-cli exit 0)
Deliverable spec validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0
instance-validation.yml, refs-check.yml, pr-mergeability-check.yml, amendment-scope-overlap-check.yml all green
postMerge: main does NOT show resource-access.schema.json at root
SR chat posts comment on EB PR #257 with schema $id + SR merge SHA

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after substrate reads part 1 + 2 verified scope as move + register, not author. Cross-repo coordination canvas published to EB-agent.
PROCEED STEP 3 issued; git mv executed; sha256 verified identical; schema re-validated against EB PR #257 instance (exit 0) at new path
Refs regenerated (resource-access v1.0.0 registered, 1.20.0 → 1.21.0), idempotent; preparing PR

notes: First cross-repo coordination deliverable in FU block. Closes one EB-side FU and one SR-side FU in a single PR. Substrate-verified scope: schema exists, validates instance cleanly, work is mechanical relocation. No FK revision needed — schema FK fields are documentary strings, not cross-schema validated. Post-merge SR comments on EB PR #257 enabling EB-agent to reactivate branch feat/resource-access-schema-2026-05-30.
